name: Cefazolin
description: Cephalosporin jiilka kowaad. Antibiyootiga safka hore ee waalidka ee caabuqyada dhaawaca halista ah iyo kahortaga qalliinka. Caymis wanaagsan oo garaam-positive ah oo ay ku jirto MSSA. Ku bixi 60 daqiiqo gudahood qalliinka la qalay si looga hortago.
indications: Infekshannada unugyada jilicsan ee halista ah
dose: 1-2g IV/IM q8h. Kahortagga qalliinka: 2g IV 60 daqiiqo gudahood ka hor inta aan la jarjarin. Ku celi 2g haddii qalliinka> 4 saacadood.
window: Kahortagga qalliinka: ku bixi 60 daqiiqo gudahood marka la qalayo.
contraindications: Xasaasiyad daran oo penicillin ah (5-10% falcelinta isdhaafsiga)
warnings: Falcelinta falcelinta xasaasiyadda penicillin: si taxaddar leh u isticmaal bukaannada xasaasiyadda leh ee penicillin.

pediatric.dose: 25-50 mg/kg IV/IM q8h (ugu badnaan 2g/qiyaas). Kahortagga: 30 mg/kg (ugu badnaan 2g) ka hor intaan la jeexin.
pediatric.note: Badbaadada oo si fiican looga bartay caafimaadka carruurta.

obstetric.note: Badbaadada uurka iyo nuujinta. Antibiyootiga waalidka ee la door bidayay ee hababka umulisada.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Surgical Prophylaxis
